days.text: Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 north to northeasterly winds.
Cloudy. Occasional showers. Showers will ease off later. Possible thunderstorms at first. Force 3 to 5 east to northeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 3 to 5 east to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 2 to 4 east to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
